channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: All 50 states now have gas prices above $4 a gallon
item.description: All 50 states have average gas prices above $4 a gallon, AAA said Wednesday, with seven topping $5 a gallon. The war with Iran continues to impact prices.

item.title: Taiwan soldiers on through Xi's threats and Trump's ambivalence
item.description: A postmortem is unfolding in Taipei after Xi Jinping warned Trump on Taiwan, and Trump responded with mixed signals.

item.title: Rubio offers "new relationship" to Cuban people
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio marked Cuban Independence Day with a Spanish-language video message to the Cuban people, placing blame...

item.title: Google reinvents search before AI rivals replace it
item.description: Google is reinventing its search product, the cash cow that funds its operations, as AI competitors loom.
